mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consultations ( user_id, lawyer_id, assignment_type, title, description, category, priority, status, fee_amount, pay_status, pay_at, settled_at, attachments, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{lawyerId}, #{assignmentType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{feeAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{payAt}, #{settledAt}, #{attachments}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username AS user_name, u.avatar AS user_avatar, l.username AS lawyer_name, l.avatar AS lawyer_avatar FROM consultations c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users l ON c.lawyer_id = l.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE consultations SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), resolved_at = IF(#{status} = 'resolved', NOW(), resolved_at) WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE consultations SET lawyer_id = #{lawyerId}, status = 'in_progress', user_confirmed_resolved = 0, lawyer_confirmed_resolved = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND (lawyer_id IS NULL OR lawyer_id = #{lawyerId})
UPDATE consultations SET pay_status = #{payStatus}, pay_at = #{payAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultations SET pay_status = 'settled', settled_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultations SET pay_status = 'refunded', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultations SET user_confirmed_resolved = #{confirmed}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultations SET lawyer_confirmed_resolved = #{confirmed}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultations SET user_confirmed_resolved = 0, lawyer_confirmed_resolved = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultations SET deleted_by_user = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultations SET deleted_by_lawyer = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultations SET deleted_by_admin = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(category, '未分类') AS category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM consultations WHERE deleted_by_admin = FALSE GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username AS user_name, u.avatar AS user_avatar, l.username AS lawyer_name, l.avatar AS lawyer_avatar FROM consultations c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users l ON c.lawyer_id = l.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT COALESCE(category, '未分类') AS category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM consultations WHERE lawyer_id = #{lawyerId} AND status = 'resolved' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
